name: 深情告白（離別與選擇）
description: 冷宮姐妹離別時的深情告白和女主最終選擇留下，觸發觀眾的感動情緒。特別是女主放棄「回到現代」的機會選擇留下，證明了她對這個世界的人和事產生了真正的情感連結。

examples.drama_title: Girl Transmigrated Unfavored Concubine,Unexpectedly Use Modern Knowledge Raise Baby,Emperor Shock!
examples.excerpt: We met when we were nothing. I will always be your Laura... Mia, I want to stay. Can a destiny already chosen still be rewritten?... I've loved spending this past year sharing so many moments with you. May the days ahead be smooth sailing and worry-free.
